allow:
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr create --title "Redesign UI and add real resource data" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Redesign entire UI with NeetCode-inspired dark/light theme \(blue-gray oklch color system\)
- NeetCode-style course layout: collapsible sidebar with sections, progress bar, lesson rating, table of contents
- Resource hub overhaul: search bar, source icons \(Ko-fi, GitHub, Booth, etc.\), FREE badges, aligned cards
- Replace 18 placeholder assets with 11 real Ko-fi VTuber resources from spreadsheet
- Add Pro landing page, theme toggle, and global cursor pointer

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify dark/light theme toggle works across all pages
- [ ] Browse resources with filters, search, and source icons
- [ ] Navigate course lessons with sidebar, prev/next, and rating
- [ ] Run `npm run seed:assets` to populate real resource data

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
